3326840.name: Nak
3326840.description: Become a ghost to save your family from ghosts. Nak is a story driven platformer with arena combat. Enter the world of Nak. Here your reflexes and analysis will be tested as you traverse vast physical and spiritual realms and square off against traditional Thai ghosts. How long will it be until you can no longer distinguish yourself from the monsters you face?
3326840.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
